summary: List Available Filters for Coordination Issues
description: This endpoint returns filters that are available to filter Coordination Issues an array of objects

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description:
The locale in which you need the link to your translation file. 
Ensure it is one of the procore available locales.

key.description: Key is the name is the filter field

value.description: Value is the localized name of the filter field

endpoint.description: Endpoint is the path to the filter options endpoint
